title: At the Hotel
description: 12 essential phrases for checking in, making requests, and handling your stay at any Spanish-speaking hotel.
situation: Hotel reception, room service, concierge, and check-out.

phrases.spanish: Tengo una reserva a nombre de...
phrases.english: I have a reservation under the name...
phrases.pronunciation: TEHN-goh OO-nah rreh-SEHR-bah ah NOHM-breh deh

phrases.english: I'd like to make a reservation
Do you have wifi? What's the password?
phrases.pronunciation: tee-EH-neh WEE-fee KWAHL ehs lah kohn-trah-SEH-nyah

phrases.english: Can you give me another towel?
Is there a safe in the room?
phrases.pronunciation: eye KAH-hah FWEHR-teh ehn lah ah-bee-tah-see-OHN

phrases.tip: 'Check-out' is used as a loanword in most Spanish hotels

phrases.spanish: ¿Puedo dejar las maletas hasta las tres?
phrases.english: Can I leave my luggage until three?
phrases.pronunciation: PWEH-doh deh-HAHR lahs mah-LEH-tahs AHS-tah lahs trehs

phrases.english: Can you order a taxi for me?
phrases.pronunciation: PWEH-deh peh-DEER oon TAHK-see PAH-rah mee
